new_action_anchor: A hand releases an object above a container and lets it fall inside.
new_phase_cues: hand holding object above container
hand releases object and it falls freely downward
object ends inside container without upright placement

new_action_anchor: A finger or tool pushes into a material mass and leaves a cavity.
new_phase_cues: tool approaches material mass
tool enters yielding substance and opens a cavity
tool retracts, leaving a cavity in the material mass

old_phase_cues: finger presses into surface, forming a dent
new_phase_cues: finger approaches soft surface
finger presses into soft surface, forming an elastic dent
finger withdraws, leaving a hole in soft body

class_name: Poking a stack of [something] so the stack collapses
new_phase_cues: finger approaches stack side
finger makes side contact and the stack loses stability
stack falls and items scatter
hand approaches [something]
hand hovers near [something] without touching
hand withdraws empty while target stays in place
new_confusion_cues: Poking a stack of [something] so the stack collapses

old_phase_cues: Hands make contact with object on surface.
Force is applied, object starts moving away.
Object separates and falls or moves off.
new_phase_cues: hands make contact with object on surface
force is applied from the side and object moves off the edge
object separates, leaves support, and falls off
new_confusion_cues: Twisting (wringing) [something] wet until water comes out

class_name: Putting [something] on the edge of [something] so it is not supported and falls down
old_phase_cues: object placed on edge with partial contact
new_phase_cues: hand holding object near edge
object placed on edge with partial contact
object loses balance, is not supported, and falls

new_action_anchor: A hand sets an object on a table so it stays upright.
new_phase_cues: hand carries object toward table
object base touches table before the hand lets go
object remains upright on the table surface
new_confusion_cues: placing object in container on table

old_phase_cues: hand makes contact with object side
object continues rolling away from hand
new_phase_cues: hand makes contact with object side
object begins rotating while staying supported on the flat surface
object continues rolling away while staying on flat surface

class_name: Twisting (wringing) [something] wet until water comes out
new_phase_cues: hands grip wet object
twist object tightly with two-hand squeeze
water drips from wet object

new_action_anchor: A hand twists an object in place while continuously holding it.
new_phase_cues: hand grasps object
wrist twists object back and forth in place
object remains held after turning with no puncture
new_confusion_cues: Twisting (wringing) [something] wet until water comes out

class_name: [Something] falling like a feather or paper
new_action_anchor: A light object is released and drifts downward through the air.
new_phase_cues: object released into open air
light object drifts downward with fluttering motion
object lands lightly after slow descent
new_confusion_cues: Twisting (wringing) [something] wet until water comes out
